overall.description: Third-person gameplay from a Western-themed video game (Red Dead Redemption 2) showing a character in a leather coat and hat exploring a rustic wooden cabin interior with an NPC, then exiting into an overcast, rainy field and walking through tall grass past a wooden outhouse.

scene_state.functional_zone: rustic cabin interior with dining area and stone fireplace

agents.ego_description: walking slowly around the cabin interior, observing the surroundings and the NPC standing by the window

notable_agents.action: standing by the window looking outside, wearing a red shirt

entered.detail: stone fireplace with active fire burning inside
wooden table covered with patterned cloth, plates and bottles on top
red metal oil lamp hanging from ceiling above table
wooden framed windows with white lace curtains allowing diffused light
heavy wooden plank door with metal handle

segments.scene_description: Inside a cozy wooden cabin, the character explores a compact dining area featuring a stone fireplace with a warm fire, a dining table with various items, and lace-curtained windows. An NPC in a red shirt stands by the far window looking outside as the camera moves around the room.

scene_state.functional_zone: open rural field with scattered trees and wooden outhouse

events.description: character opens wooden door and exits cabin into overcast rainy field

agents.ego_description: walking away from the cabin through tall grass, passing a wooden outhouse on the right, heading toward the tree line

entered.detail: exterior wall of the wooden cabin just exited, with weathered planks
stack of chopped firewood on the ground near the door
small wooden shed with sloped roof and single door
tall green grass covering the ground, wet from rain
deciduous trees scattered across the rolling landscape under gray sky

segments.scene_description: The character exits the cabin into an overcast, rainy rural landscape. They walk past a woodpile and a small wooden outhouse, continuing through dense tall grass toward a distant tree line. The environment is open and natural, with wet grass and scattered trees under a gray sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from the warm, enclosed intimacy of a rustic cabin into a vast, rain-swept rural landscape. It begins inside a cozy wooden interior, gliding past a stone fireplace with a crackling fire and a dining table before passing an NPC in a red shirt gazing out from behind lace curtains. As the character moves toward the exit, the scene shifts abruptly from the golden indoor light to the muted gray tones of an overcast day. The camera then follows the character out into the rain, passing a woodpile and a small wooden outhouse while venturing deeper into dense, wet tall grass. The shot finally opens up to reveal a wide, natural expanse leading toward a distant tree line under a heavy, clouded sky.
